title: Pittsburgh PD: Logan W. Cumberland Search & Response, Cranberry Township PA - July 2, 2024

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Pennsylvania Right to Know Act, I hereby request the following records:

I request all records related to Pittsburgh Police Department’s involvement in the July 2, 2024 incident and search for Logan W. Cumberland (age 37, of Ellwood City, PA) in Cranberry Township, Butler County. This includes, but is not limited to:

- Dispatch logs, CAD reports, and radio transmissions
- Officer assignments, overtime, or deployment records
- Officer and witness statements
- Photographs, diagrams, evidence logs, and non-bodycam video
- Communications with Pennsylvania State Police, Cranberry Township PD, FBI, or other agencies
- Any after-action reports or internal reviews

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Citizen Commission

title: ATF Records: Logan W. Cumberland Firearms, Manifesto & Incident, Cranberry Township PA - July 2, 2024

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I request all records concerning Logan W. Cumberland (DOB December 4, 1986, of Ellwood City, PA) and the July 2, 2024 incident in Cranberry Township, Butler County, Pennsylvania, near Cranberry Highlands Golf Course. This includes, but is not limited to:

- Any firearm traces, NICS checks, or records related to weapons found in Cumberland’s vehicle
- Any manifesto, notes, writings, or concerning documents recovered from the vehicle or scene
- Communications with any law enforcement or government agencies (including but not limited to Pennsylvania State Police, Cranberry Township PD, Pittsburgh Police, FBI, or others)
- Any ATF support, assistance, or involvement in the incident or investigation
- After-action reports or related correspondence

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Citizen Commission

title: Flock Safety Contracts | Q2 2026 | DeKalb County Sheriff's Office

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All contracts, licenses, MOUs, MOAs, data agreements, letters of intent, State of Work documents, Scope of Work documents, and other agreement documents with Flock Safety that were active any time between 1/1/2025 and the date this request is fulfilled.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

a
